ValidationRule.description: Not Sent must not have an external request ID; other statuses require one. Succeeded requires a decision reference.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( TEXT(IntegrationStatus__c) = "Not Sent", NOT(ISBLANK(ExternalRequestId__c)) ), AND( OR( TEXT(IntegrationStatus__c) = "Pending", TEXT(IntegrationStatus__c) = "Succeeded", TEXT(IntegrationStatus__c) = "Retry Pending", TEXT(IntegrationStatus__c) = "Failed" ), ISBLANK(ExternalRequestId__c) ), AND( TEXT(IntegrationStatus__c) = "Succeeded", ISBLANK(ExternalDecisionReference__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Integration status is inconsistent with external request ID and/or decision reference.
